reason: Response A shows the hallmarks of a smaller default-register model like Haiku: generic warm phrasing, even paragraph structure, hedging ("I genuinely," "I hope"), and crucially the literal "[Your name]" placeholder that Claude models reliably emit when no name is supplied. Response B is far more voice-driven and personalized—it invents a signer ("David"), uses concrete sensory specifics, and performs deliberate literary craft, which reads like a larger model imitating warmth rather than Haiku's plainer, safer default.
